Welcome! You have reached the Zelda Gaiden Realm! We are one of the first sites to ever subject: Zelda Gaiden. Due to the game not even out yet nor any info what so ever released, we will provide the latest news until the game so comes out. Once the game comes out, this site is sure to bloom. We will probably have Walkthroughs, Secrets, Cheats, a whole bunch of information. So look around for a while. This site is just getting started! Oh yea, make sure your Java Script is working :o)

NOTE: All webrings are located below.

Special Note: Thanks to Xaiyan for a great background, you can viset him at his DBZ site, The DBZStar.

Stuck in someone elses frames? Click here.

1/23/00-Lots of Quiz Scores
I updated about 11 quiz scores in the Quiz Score Section. Go see if your name is there!

1/22/00-More comming soon.
Hey everyone! Well, I have about 11 quizes to grade and more Zelda Gaiden pictures to put up. Since it is 12:17 right now, I'm going to bed. Expect them tomorrow. Bye! :o) Oh yea, I cleared the old updates, the page should run faster.
